task.title: Write implementation compiler skill contract
task.summary: Define implementation-mode instructions for executing one roadmap task, producing `implementation_build`, and requesting fresh validation before closure.

goal.outcome: Implementation mode gives agents exact build-before-validation lifecycle and production-grade task closure evidence.
acceptance: `codewiki-implementation` skill frontmatter triggers on executing one atomic roadmap task from a planning build or `/wiki-resume`.

Instructions state exact actions, tools, artifact-status coordination, TDD/test-design expectations, `codewiki_build kind=implementation` point, fresh validation handoff, task-close gate, and output format.
Instructions fix ordering so implementation build is compiled before gateway validation, and closure requires passing validation/content proof when policy requires it.
non_goals: Do not change validation gateway policy.
Do not implement arbitrary roadmap work; only implementation-mode skill/prompt guidance and supporting tests.
verification: Inspect implementation prompt and skill against validation-gateway spec.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Implemented TASK-096 implementation compiler skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-implementation skill, exact artifact-status/TDD/build-before-validation/fresh-validation/task-close guidance, updated resume prompt, and tests covering the new public skill surface.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck

evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for implementation skill existence, frontmatter, artifact status, `codewiki_build kind="implementation"`, build-before-validation ordering, fresh validation handoff, `source_planning_build`, task close gate, and validation-before-build prohibition.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-implementation` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback, documentation, planning, and implementation compiler skills.
notes: Targeted asset/package tests were run before the broader smoke, pack, feature, and typecheck suite.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Created focused public implementation compiler skill under `skills/codewiki-implementation/`.
Rewrote `skills/codewiki/loops/implementation.md` so `implementation_build` is emitted before fresh validation.
Updated `/wiki-resume` implementation prompt asset with artifact-status, build-before-validation, handoff, and task-close gate guidance.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new implementation skill surface.
notes: No TypeScript runtime behavior changed; edits are skill/prompt/documentation/test contract changes.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for implementation skill existence, frontmatter, artifact status, `codewiki_build kind="implementation"`, build-before-validation ordering, fresh validation handoff, `source_planning_build`, task close gate, and validation-before-build prohibition.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-implementation` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback, documentation, planning, and implementation compiler skills.
code_change_evidence: Created focused public implementation compiler skill under `skills/codewiki-implementation/`.
Rewrote `skills/codewiki/loops/implementation.md` so `implementation_build` is emitted before fresh validation.
Updated `/wiki-resume` implementation prompt asset with artifact-status, build-before-validation, handoff, and task-close gate guidance.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new implementation skill surface.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `codewiki-implementation` skill frontmatter triggers on executing one atomic roadmap task from a planning build or `/wiki-resume`.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Created `skills/codewiki-implementation/SKILL.md` with `name: codewiki-implementation` and a description targeting one atomic roadmap task from validated `planning_build`, `/wiki-resume`, or accepted implementation handoff.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions state exact actions, tools, artifact-status coordination, TDD/test-design expectations, `codewiki_build kind=implementation` point, fresh validation handoff, task-close gate, and output format.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `skills/codewiki-implementation/SKILL.md`, `skills/codewiki-implementation/references/tools.md`, `skills/codewiki/loops/implementation.md`, and `skills/codewiki/prompts/resume-implementation.md` define `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_session`, `codewiki_artifact_status`, TDD/test-design evidence, checks, `codewiki_build kind="implementation"`, `codewiki_session_handoff`, task evidence/close gates, and final output fields.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions fix ordering so implementation build is compiled before gateway validation, and closure requires passing validation/content proof when policy requires it.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Implementation skill, tool reference, loop doc, and resume prompt all state implementation build happens after edits/checks and before implementation validation; task-close guidance requires required pass validation/content proof before `codewiki_task action="close"`.

closure_brief.user_intent: Continue improving CodeWiki skills by adding focused compiler loop skills with precise tool/build/gateway guidance; implement the implementation compiler skill contract next.
implemented_changes: Added dedicated `codewiki-implementation` public skill with exact one-task implementation workflow.
Added implementation tool reference for artifact status, TDD/test-design evidence, implementation build, fresh validation handoff, and task-close gates.
Reordered implementation loop and resume prompt guidance so `implementation_build` is compiled before gateway validation.
Updated README and tests for the new public implementation skill surface.
acceptance_evidence: Implementation skill frontmatter and workflow exist.
Implementation skill requires artifact status, test-design/TDD evidence, `codewiki_build kind="implementation"`, fresh validation handoff, and task-close gate.
Resume prompt and loop guidance now place implementation build before validation.
Tests and package smoke pass with the new public implementation skill.
checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck
non_goals_preserved: Did not change validation gateway policy.
Did not implement arbitrary roadmap work.
Did not change runtime TypeScript behavior.
remaining_risks: Generated CodeWiki graph/task view files changed because roadmap/build state was updated.
Implementation build lacks source_planning_build due accepted feedback-to-task shortcut used before the new planning skill is validated.
TASK-093, TASK-094, and TASK-095 fresh validations remain pending.

risks: Implementation build does not cite a planning_build because TASK-096 implements the implementation skill itself from accepted feedback before the new planning loop is validated.
TASK-093, TASK-094, and TASK-095 remain pending fresh-context validation from staged handoffs.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
